title: orchis sambucina subsp. insularis
intro: Orchis sambucina subsp. insularis, also known as the island-spur orchid or insular butterfly orchid, is a subspecies of orchid native to the Mediterranean islands. This plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine due to its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antispasmodic effects. The health benefits of Orchis sambucina subsp. insularis include its ability to relieve respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as its use in treating digestive problems and skin conditions. Herbal preparations of the plant may include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which are typically made from the plant's roots or leaves, and are used to treat various health issues.
